Domain scores
Score Report & Stakeholder Reports
Domain scores, detailed standard breakdown, and stakeholder views — all in one place.
Scores update automatically as you score standards in the Audit pages.
📋 Detailed School Audit Report
Comprehensive audit findings across all domains. Export as PDF for sharing and archiving.
📊
Report not yet generated
Score standards in the Audit pages first, then click "Generate Report".
Transformation Plan
30 sequenced actions across 3 phases. Expand any action for Do's, Don'ts and Interference Risks.
Audit Checklists
Use during site visits. Every item is mapped to an audit standard. Scores flow automatically into the audit domain scores.

Audit Standards Editor
Holistify Admin only
Holistify standards are always preserved. Edits apply only to the selected school's audit session. Custom or uploaded standards are shown with a gold indicator. Deleted standards are greyed out and excluded from scoring but not permanently removed.
📎
Edit Standard
4-Level Rubric Descriptors
Level 1 — Needs Improvement
Level 2 — Satisfactory
Level 3 — Good
Level 4 — Excellent
